name: sulis-context
description: [DEPRECATED at v0.4.0 — consolidated into the sulis plugin] Context Cartographer functionality now lives at /sulis:discover-context, /sulis:refresh-context, /sulis:show-context with the context-cartographer agent in plugins/sulis/agents/. This plugin shell remains for marketplace compatibility; no new development. See plugins/sulis/CHANGELOG.md v0.35.0 for the consolidation narrative.
